response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified an intro segment followed by a vocal performance. 2. Identified the song as 'すてきなホリデイ' based on on-screen text. 3. Identified the composer as Mariya Takeuchi based on on-screen credits. 4. Performed a search for the lyrics using the original Japanese title and composer. 5. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 6. Mapped the scenes and generated the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory segment followed by a full vocal performance of the song 'Sutekina Holiday' by Sakura Miko.

scenes.description: The video starts with an instrumental background track playing over a still promotional image. No vocals are present.
Sakura Miko performs a cover of 'Sutekina Holiday'. Credits on-screen indicate the original song was written and composed by Mariya Takeuchi.
scenes.song_title: すてきなホリデイ (Sutekina Holiday)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
近づいている冬の足音
耳を澄ませば聞こえる鈴の音…
寝ぼけた頭に響く目覚ましを
手さぐりで止めたあと雪の気配
始まりを告げるすてきな季節が

happy holidays, happy holidays
what a glorious time of year!

すやすやと眠る子供達の手に
抱かれたテディベアももう待ちきれない
クリスマスが今年もやって来る
悲しかった出来事を消し去るように
さあパジャマを脱いだら出かけよう
少しずつ白くなる街路樹を駆け抜けて

華やぎ始めた街は急ぎ足
贈り物決まる頃黄昏れてく
かじかんだ指をママが温めるね

happy holidays, happy holidays
what a glorious time of year!

大切なものはみんなそばにある
穏やかな毎日が続くぜいたく
クリスマスがもうじきやって来る
うれしさをかくせない犬や猫まで
もみの木に灯る明かりをうけて
いつもよりやさしそうなパパの目が笑ってる
クリスマスは誰にもやって来る
もしひとりぼっちでも淋しがらずに
心に住むサンタに呼びかけて
幼い頃の夢を思い出してごらんよ

クリスマスが今年もやって来る
悲しかった出来事を消し去るように
さあパジャマを脱いだら出かけよう
少しずつ白くなる街路樹を駆け抜けて

happy happy holidays
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The footsteps of winter are approaching.
If you listen carefully, you can hear the sound of bells...
A clock alarm is ringing in my sleepy head.
There is a sign of snow after stopping the clock by fumbling about.
It is a wonderful season to mark the beginning.

Happy holidays, happy holidays
What a glorious time of year!

Children are sleeping comfortably.
The teddy bears in the hands of children can not wait anymore.
Christmas is coming again this year.
Christmas seems to erase the sad happenings.
Now take off your pajamas and let's go outside.
Let's run through the roadside trees that are gradually turning white.

The city is beginning to flourish, and it's in a hurry.
It will be twilight by the time you've decided on your gift.
Mom will warm up your numb fingers, right?

Happy holidays, happy holidays
What a glorious time of year!

The precious things are all by my side.
And the calm days are continuing in luxury.
Christmas will be coming soon.
Even dogs and cats can't hide their joy.
Taking in the light on the fir trees,
Dad's eyes are laughing more gently than usual.
Christmas comes to everyone.
Even if you live alone, you shouldn't feel lonely.
Let's call on the Santa who lives in your heart.
Let's remember your childhood dreams.

Christmas is coming again this year.
Christmas seems to erase the sad happenings.
Now take off your pajamas and let's go outside.
Let's run through the roadside trees that are gradually turning white.

Happy happy holidays
